item.title: Excavator Arm and Bucket Restoration
item.description: An excavator arm and bucket undergo a complete restoration, repairing years of wear and preparing them for heavy-duty service once again.

media:content.media:title: Excavator Arm and Bucket Restoration
media:content.media:description: An excavator arm and bucket undergo a complete restoration, repairing years of wear and preparing them for heavy-duty service once again.

item.title: Franna Crane Split and Repair, Part Two
item.description: The next stage of the Franna crane restoration focuses on major repairs, bringing this heavy-duty machine one step closer to returning to work.

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Split and Repair, Part Two
media:content.media:description: The next stage of the Franna crane restoration focuses on major repairs, bringing this heavy-duty machine one step closer to returning to work.

item.title: Welding a 7-Metre Walkway Frame
item.description: A massive 7-metre walkway frame comes together through precision welding, creating a strong and durable structure built to last.

media:content.media:title: Welding a 7-Metre Walkway Frame
media:content.media:description: A massive 7-metre walkway frame comes together through precision welding, creating a strong and durable structure built to last.

item.title: Making a Heavy-Duty Button Tool Holder
item.description: A heavy-duty button tool holder is machined and assembled to deliver strength, accuracy, and reliable performance for demanding workshop applications.

media:content.media:title: Making a Heavy-Duty Button Tool Holder
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty button tool holder is machined and assembled to deliver strength, accuracy, and reliable performance for demanding workshop applications.

item.title: Making a Hitachi EX1900 Cylinder Rod
item.description: A precision machining and fabrication process to make a Hitachi EX1900 boom lift cylinder rod. Clean workshop work, careful measurements, and solid engineering come together in a satisfying repair.

media:content.media:title: Making a Hitachi EX1900 Cylinder Rod
media:content.media:description: A precision machining and fabrication process to make a Hitachi EX1900 boom lift cylinder rod. Clean workshop work, careful measurements, and solid engineering come together in a satisfying repair.

item.title: Custom Rolling Tool Ready to Go
item.description: A custom rolling tool is finished and ready for use, showcasing precise machining and careful workshop craftsmanship. A clean example of practical engineering in action—what would you use it for?

media:content.media:title: Custom Rolling Tool Ready to Go
media:content.media:description: A custom rolling tool is finished and ready for use, showcasing precise machining and careful workshop craftsmanship. A clean example of practical engineering in action—what would you use it for?

item.title: Shop-Made Chain Clamps Put to the Test
item.description: Pre-assembly check, tack, weld it out, then test it on the Zayer. These shop-made chain clamps worked better than expected and look the part too. What did you think of the finished result?

media:content.media:title: Shop-Made Chain Clamps Put to the Test
media:content.media:description: Pre-assembly check, tack, weld it out, then test it on the Zayer. These shop-made chain clamps worked better than expected and look the part too. What did you think of the finished result?

item.title: Franna Crane Split in Half: Part One
item.description: A detailed workshop process as the Franna is split in half for engineering work. Precision, heavy machinery, and careful fabrication come together in this first part of the repair. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Split in Half: Part One
media:content.media:description: A detailed workshop process as the Franna is split in half for engineering work. Precision, heavy machinery, and careful fabrication come together in this first part of the repair. What comes next?

item.title: Precision Work on a Challenging Project
item.description: A detailed look at the precision work and engineering effort behind this project. Even when the outcome doesn’t go as planned, the machining and fabrication process still shows real craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Precision Work on a Challenging Project
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at the precision work and engineering effort behind this project. Even when the outcome doesn’t go as planned, the machining and fabrication process still shows real craftsmanship.

item.title: Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 2
item.description: A closer look at making shop-made clamp vices in Part 2, with careful machining and practical workshop craftsmanship. A satisfying example of precision tools built for real engineering work.

media:content.media:title: Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 2
media:content.media:description: A closer look at making shop-made clamp vices in Part 2, with careful machining and practical workshop craftsmanship. A satisfying example of precision tools built for real engineering work.

item.title: A Precision Pair of V-Blocks
item.description: A matched set of V-blocks is crafted for high-accuracy machining and inspection work, ensuring precise alignment for cylindrical components. Small tools, critical precision.

media:content.media:title: A Precision Pair of V-Blocks
media:content.media:description: A matched set of V-blocks is crafted for high-accuracy machining and inspection work, ensuring precise alignment for cylindrical components. Small tools, critical precision.

item.title: Repairing a D11 Bulldozer Cylinder Barrel
item.description: A damaged CAT D11 cylinder barrel undergoes inspection and repair to restore strength, sealing, and performance under extreme loads. Can it be salvaged for heavy-duty use?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a D11 Bulldozer Cylinder Barrel
media:content.media:description: A damaged CAT D11 cylinder barrel undergoes inspection and repair to restore strength, sealing, and performance under extreme loads. Can it be salvaged for heavy-duty use?

item.title: Making Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 1
item.description: A step-by-step fabrication project to create shop-made clamp vices, focusing on practical machining and workshop problem-solving. A clever way to build tools using in-house capability.

media:content.media:title: Making Shop-Made Clamp Vices, Part 1
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step fabrication project to create shop-made clamp vices, focusing on practical machining and workshop problem-solving. A clever way to build tools using in-house capability.

item.title: Machining New Pins for a Caterpillar 14M Grader
item.description: New precision-machined pins are produced for a CAT 14M grader to replace worn components and restore tight tolerances. Small parts, big impact on machine performance.

media:content.media:title: Machining New Pins for a Caterpillar 14M Grader
media:content.media:description: New precision-machined pins are produced for a CAT 14M grader to replace worn components and restore tight tolerances. Small parts, big impact on machine performance.

item.title: We SPLIT the Franna in HALF!
item.description: A Franna crane undergoes a full structural split to allow critical access for repair and refurbishment. A complex heavy-duty operation that shows just how far engineers go to restore large machinery safely and effectively

media:content.media:title: We SPLIT the Franna in HALF!
media:content.media:description: A Franna crane undergoes a full structural split to allow critical access for repair and refurbishment. A complex heavy-duty operation that shows just how far engineers go to restore large machinery safely and effectively

item.title: Repairing an Auger Drive Shaft
item.description: A closer look at auger drive shaft damage and the machining approach needed to restore it properly. This repair highlights careful measurement, precision work, and practical machine maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Repairing an Auger Drive Shaft
media:content.media:description: A closer look at auger drive shaft damage and the machining approach needed to restore it properly. This repair highlights careful measurement, precision work, and practical machine maintenance.
